rootCause: Auth shell and role gating used persistent-session state too broadly during/after hydration, creating stale navbar/route mismatches; additionally, custom X-Client-Retry-Attempts request header triggered CORS preflight rejection on login.

checks.name: three-user role hydration parity
checks.detail: DB role + JWT role claims align for pilot, ayhan, mahir.

checks.name: /auth/me x10 stability parity
checks.detail: Each user keeps 200 on ten consecutive /auth/me checks.

checks.name: refresh/ctrl+f5/back parity
checks.detail: Each user keeps valid session through refresh simulations.

checks.name: protected route parity
checks.detail: Admin users keep admin routes; USER does not receive admin route access.

checks.name: navbar/auth shell hydration determinism
checks.detail: Auth shell rules are deterministic and non-stale by source audit.

checks.name: live auth login path CORS-safe
checks.detail: Browser auth requests do not inject custom preflight headers.
